name: private-website
description: Monorepo dev orchestration (book-mall, tool-web, finance-web, story-web, canvas-web)

scripts.dev:all:
pnpm dev:preflight && node -e "console.log('
  >>> 开发导航 (含 7 进程状态): http://localhost:3000/dev
  >>> 漫剧任务看板: http://localhost:3000/dev/story/tasks
  >>> 画布任务看板: http://localhost:3000/dev/canvas/tasks
  >>> 子站: book-mall :3000  tool-web :3001  finance-web :3002  story-web :3003  canvas-web :3004
  >>> 后台 poll-loop 心跳每 10s 写入 os.tmpdir()，/dev 页面会显示运行 / 心跳停止 / 未运行。
')" && concurrently -k -n mall,tool,finance,story,canvas,story-poll,canvas-poll -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,red,white "pnpm --dir book-mall dev" "pnpm --dir tool-web dev" "pnpm --dir finance-web dev" "pnpm --dir story-web dev" "pnpm --dir canvas-web dev" "pnpm --filter book-mall run story:poll-loop" "pnpm --filter book-mall run canvas:poll-loop"
scripts.dev:all:nopoll:
pnpm dev:preflight && node -e "console.log('
  >>> 开发导航: http://localhost:3000/dev
  >>> 注意：未启动 poll-loop，KIE 任务会一直停留在生成中。
')" && concurrently -k -n mall,tool,finance,story,canvas -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "pnpm --dir book-mall dev" "pnpm --dir tool-web dev" "pnpm --dir finance-web dev" "pnpm --dir story-web dev" "pnpm --dir canvas-web dev"
